violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - Spacers for the sink and hand towels made of untreated wood.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - Clean in place equipment could use a more thorough cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, Walls, Ceiling Require more thorough cleaning.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
